title: phyllorkis kingii
intro: Phyllorkis kingii, also known as the African forest orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity against certain pathogens. Phyllorkis kingii is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
